level_signals: 8+ years of experience in People Operations, Service Delivery Management, or Business Operations
Leads global transformation roadmap and centralized intake model
Partners directly with senior leadership on operational roadmaps and ROI analysis

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 8+ years of experience in People Operations, Service Delivery Management, or Business Operations within a high-growth, global environment.
Proven track record of driving a central work intake model and prioritization framework.
Demonstrated experience leading operational infrastructure such as workforce management (WFM), Quality Assurance (QA), or service enablement.
Strong fluency with the ability to define requirements for AI, RPA, and complex case-management ecosystems.
Exceptional analytical skills with the ability to use data analysis tools to forecast demand and model operational capacity for complex workstreams.
Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills; comfortable driving operational roadmaps and ROI analysis with senior leadership.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience leading service design or the optimization of specialized operations in a centralized delivery model. Proven track record of leading process migration efforts involving automation (RPA) or AI solutions.

Advanced proficiency with HRIS (Workday) and Service Management tools (Salesforce). Experience with Confluence or other knowledge management systems, and a track record of driving documentation adoption.
Data fluency with the ability to use data analysis tools to forecast demand and model operational capacity. Certification in ITIL, Lean, or Six Sigma methodologies.
Experience navigating rapid innovation alongside stringent compliance and audit requirements. Experience in vendor management or supporting outsourced service models.

scope.surface: Global People Operations horizontal — transformation roadmap, centralized work intake, capacity governance, QA, and AI/automation-driven operational scaling
scope.business_model: internal function within a B2B fintech/payments platform
primary_metrics_inferred: Actionable KPI suite for delivery engine
ROI on automation and AI initiatives
Quality Assurance and process adherence scores
core_responsibilities: Drive improvements in internal operating mechanisms toward proactive, automation and AI-driven operations
Introduce and lead foundational capabilities in workforce forecasting, service enablement, and global operational strategy
Transition team from reactive ticket monitoring to proactive capacity management
Design and lead the mandatory, centralized 'Front Door' for all work entering the Global People Operations team
Partner with People+ COEs and other teams to ensure operational readiness for high-priority initiatives
Manage deployment of ops SMEs and associates into cross-functional projects
Support internal prioritization of the Global People Operations roadmap
Drive continuous improvement to deflect volume to automated or self-service solutions
Aggregate monitoring data to identify trends and root causes
Build framework to run Quality Assurance and monitor adherence to operational standards
Define and track the 'Actionable KPI' suite for the delivery engine

green_flags: Clear scope and well-articulated responsibilities across distinct operational domains
Preferred qualifications explicitly called out as a bonus, not a requirement
Role has strategic visibility — direct interface with senior leadership on roadmaps and ROI
Stripe's scale provides meaningful opportunity to drive global operational impact
red_flags: No location specified — remote/hybrid/onsite policy unclear
Visa sponsorship and work authorization not mentioned
8+ years hard minimum may be strict for candidates with adjacent but equivalent experience
